overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the player walking through a futuristic neon-lit city, exiting a building, traversing commercial streets with heavy neon signage, and approaching a Trauma Team emergency medical scene with armed personnel and a hovering vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service corridor with vending machines

events.description: exits the building through a large doorway into the bright outdoor street

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit corridor toward the street exit, passing by service counters and industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: person standing near the exit doorway looking outside

entered.detail: tall cylindrical vending machine with bright purple color and yellow warning stickers
rough unfinished concrete walls with exposed structural elements
industrial metal staircase leading to upper levels
long counter with fluorescent lighting and equipment behind it
exposed ventilation ducts and electrical conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dimly lit industrial interior with concrete walls and exposed piping. A distinctive purple vending machine stands in the center of the corridor as the player approaches the bright exit leading to the street outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with neon advertising

events.description: emerges from indoor corridor into open urban street with bright neon signage
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the main road with heavy neon signage
crosses a street intersection with yellow zebra crossing markings

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs, observing the futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: futuristic blue car driving along the street with sleek aerodynamic design
pedestrian standing near an open garage entrance with green lighting

entered.detail: large rectangular red neon sign with white text reading NOODLE mounted on building facade
tall vertical digital screens displaying advertisements on building sides
distinctive red-colored sidewalk tiles reflecting neon lights
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a futuristic commercial street, the scene is dominated by vibrant neon signage including a prominent red 'NOODLE' sign. The player walks along red-tinted pavement past various storefronts and digital billboards while futuristic vehicles drive by and pedestrians walk along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: emergency response plaza with Trauma Team vehicle

events.description: approaches an active Trauma Team emergency scene with medical personnel and hovering vehicle
slows down and turns to observe the Trauma Team personnel attending to a casualty on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the Trauma Team emergency response, watching the armed medics work on a patient

notable_agents.action: Trauma Team medic in white and green armor kneeling beside a patient on the ground
Trauma Team guard standing watch with rifle near the emergency vehicle

entered.detail: large white and green hovering ambulance vehicle with red cross markings and thrusters underneath
pink and white striped holographic tape cordoning off the emergency area
wooden pagoda-style roof structure attached to modern building facade
bright green automated kiosk with traditional Japanese roof styling on top

segments.scene_description: The player enters an open plaza area where a Trauma Team emergency vehicle hovers above the ground with medical personnel in green armor attending to a casualty. The scene includes traditional Japanese architectural elements mixed with futuristic technology, and the player observes the emergency response before continuing past.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim industrial interior into the vibrant, neon-drenched chaos of a futuristic city street. It begins within a concrete corridor of exposed piping, passing a purple vending machine while moving toward a bright light at the exit. As the camera emerges outdoors, the environment shifts abruptly to a commercial district dominated by red-tinted pavement and glowing digital billboards, including a prominent red Noodle sign. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where traditional Japanese architecture blends with high-tech elements, leading the camera toward a hovering Trauma Team vehicle and armored medical personnel attending to a casualty.
